title: Cobblemon Trainer Battle - Trainers+
description: A compilation of skins for the gym leaders, elite four members, and champions for Cobblemon Trainer Battle.
body: Just a basic reskin for the gym leaders, elite four members, and champions in Cobblemon Trainer Battle. All skins were found on NameMC, SkinDex, or PlanetMinecraft. I only made slight edits to some. I scrapped this together hastily, sorry for not crediting every author.
